name: Bonus Golf
about: Bonus Golf is an indoor golf facility featuring four simulator bays equipped with Uneekor's Eye XO launch monitor technology and GSPro software. The venue offers a casual atmosphere for playing rounds, practicing, and socializing, with seating for up to 32 guests. Pricing is structured on a per-bay, hourly basis, with rates varying by day and time, and the facility is available for group events, leagues, and individual practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Uneekor Eye XO launch monitor technology provides best-in-class data
GSPro software offers a vast database of over 650 golf courses
Flexible bay bookings allow for up to 6 players per hour at no extra cost
On-site bar and partnership with DipStiggy's Lounge for food and drinks

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food is allowed; partnership with DipStiggy's Lounge for food options
Alcohol available for purchase on-site; no outside alcohol permitted

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end photometric camera and infrared optical launch monitor

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Golf balls and molded tees are provided in the simulators. You can use your own clubs, but dark-colored tees are recommended for optimal performance with the Uneekor system.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food is allowed, but outside alcohol is not. Alcoholic beverages must be purchased on-site through the partnership with DipStiggy's Lounge.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It typically takes one hour for one player to complete 18 holes. Putting settings can be adjusted to play more quickly or at a slower pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Bonus Golf is not specifically marketed as a kid-friendly venue. The focus is on adult-oriented activities such as leagues, parties, and practice sessions.
